review: stole my money and then my points. 0/10

Another 4 years since my review and this app is finding new ways to get on my nerves. Don't want it to charge one of your payment methods in the drive-thru so you toggled it off? You triggered their trap card because it doesn't matter, it'll charge it anyway! I guess you don't get to have my payment methods anymore.
They are doing better with the app.

this app is the most troublesome app EVER!!! can't use it to redeem points or use my offers 🙄 maybe 3. times out of 10 that it will work. so annoying.
